title: buildah login does not support JFrog Artifactory based registry
body:
### Issue Description

buildah login command does issue a ping-like request to check remote registry availability. This request is based on two Urls: https://myregistry.mycountry/v2/ and https://myregistry.mycountry/v1/_ping

Both requests get a 404 status with JFrog Artifactory based registry. Indeed, JFrog Artifactory does only support request https://myregistry.mycountry/artifactory/api/system/ping as stated in [doc](https://jfrog.com/help/r/jfrog-rest-apis/system-health-ping)




### Steps to reproduce the issue

`buildah login --log-level=debug --username myname --password mypassword mycompany.mycountry`


### Describe the results you received

```
...
DEBU[0000] Loading registries configuration "/etc/containers/registries.conf" 
DEBU[0000] Loading registries configuration "/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/shortnames.conf" 
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching mycompany.mycountry found in /run/user/1000/containers/auth.json 
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching mycompany.mycountry found in /home/myuser/.config/containers/auth.json 
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching mycompany.mycountry found in /home/myuser/.docker/config.json 
DEBU[0000] No credentials matching mycompany.mycountry found in /home/myuser/.dockercfg 
DEBU[0000] No credentials for mycompany.mycountry found   
DEBU[0000] Looking for TLS certificates and private keys in /etc/docker/certs.d/mycompany.mycountry 
DEBU[0000] GET https://mycompany.mycountry/v2/            
DEBU[0000] Ping https://mycompany.mycountry/v2/ status 404 
DEBU[0000] GET https://mycompany.mycountry/v1/_ping       
DEBU[0000] Ping https://mycompany.mycountry/v1/_ping status 404 
Error: authenticating creds for "mycompany.mycountry": pinging container registry mycompany.mycountry: unknown: Not Found
```

### Describe the results you expected

Login succeded

### buildah version output

```yaml
buildah version
Version:         1.33.7
Go Version:      go1.22.2
Image Spec:      1.1.0-rc.5
Runtime Spec:    1.1.0

image Version:   5.29.2

BuildPlatform:   linux/amd64
```


### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
